'''hotakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabilographic|stabilographic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabilographic|stabilographic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hotakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotakithi|hotakithi]] || [[word:hotakiji|hotakiji]] || [[word:hotakishi|hotakishi]] || [[word:hotakiki|hotakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotakuthuthu|hotakuthuthu]] || [[word:hotakujuju|hotakujuju]] || [[word:hotakushushu|hotakushushu]] || [[word:hotakukuku|hotakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotakuthu|hotakuthu]] || [[word:hotakuju|hotakuju]] || [[word:hotakushu|hotakushu]] || [[word:hotakuku|hotakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotakufthuf|hotakufthuf]] || [[word:hotakufjuf|hotakufjuf]] || [[word:hotakufshuf|hotakufshuf]] || [[word:hotakufkuf|hotakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotakethe|hotakethe]] || [[word:hotakeje|hotakeje]] || [[word:hotakeshe|hotakeshe]] || [[word:hotakeke|hotakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotakothotho|hotakothotho]] || [[word:hotakojojo|hotakojojo]] || [[word:hotakoshosho|hotakoshosho]] || [[word:hotakokoko|hotakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotakotho|hotakotho]] || [[word:hotakojo|hotakojo]] || [[word:hotakosho|hotakosho]] || [[word:hotakoko|hotakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotakofthof|hotakofthof]] || [[word:hotakofjof|hotakofjof]] || [[word:hotakofshof|hotakofshof]] || [[word:hotakofkof|hotakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfthĂŻf|hotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfjĂŻf|hotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfshĂŻf|hotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfkĂŻf|hotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hotakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hotakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hotakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hotakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfthĂŻf|hotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfjĂŻf|hotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfshĂŻf|hotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfkĂŻf|hotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfthĂŻf|hotakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfjĂŻf|hotakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfshĂŻf|hotakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hotakĂŻfkĂŻf|hotakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotakĂŠthĂŠ|hotakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hotakĂŠjĂŠ|hotakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hotakĂŠshĂŠ|hotakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hotakĂŠkĂŠ|hotakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotakathatha|hotakathatha]] || [[word:hotakajaja|hotakajaja]] || [[word:hotakashasha|hotakashasha]] || [[word:hotakakaka|hotakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotakatha|hotakatha]] || [[word:hotakaja|hotakaja]] || [[word:hotakasha|hotakasha]] || [[word:hotakaka|hotakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotakafthaf|hotakafthaf]] || [[word:hotakafjaf|hotakafjaf]] || [[word:hotakafshaf|hotakafshaf]] || [[word:hotakafkaf|hotakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hotakasha|hotakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotakshĂ«sha|hotakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotakrosha|hotakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotakmusha|hotakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotakyasha|hotakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotaknkshĂ«sha|gohotaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotaknkrosha|gohotaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotaknkmusha|gohotaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotaknkyasha|gohotaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hotatakasha|hotatakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotatakshĂ«sha|hotatakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotatakrosha|hotatakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotatakmusha|hotatakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotatakyasha|hotatakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotataknkshĂ«sha|gohotataknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotataknkrosha|gohotataknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotataknkmusha|gohotataknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotataknkyasha|gohotataknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hetĂŠkasha|hetĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hetĂŠkshĂ«sha|hetĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hetĂŠkrosha|hetĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hetĂŠkmusha|hetĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hetĂŠkyasha|hetĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohetĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gohetĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohetĂŠknkrosha|gohetĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohetĂŠknkmusha|gohetĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohetĂŠknkyasha|gohetĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hotfakasha|hotfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotfakshĂ«sha|hotfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotfakrosha|hotfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotfakmusha|hotfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotfakyasha|hotfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotfaknkshĂ«sha|gohotfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotfaknkrosha|gohotfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotfaknkmusha|gohotfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotfaknkyasha|gohotfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
